ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The most popular .NET UI client technology

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ClassIsland/ClassIsland
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ClassIsland/ClassIsland
Language: c%23
一款功能强、可定制、跨平台，适用于班级多媒体屏幕的课表信息显示工具，可以一目了然地显示各种信息。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI-powered bridge connecting LLMs and advanced AI agents to the Unity Editor via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Chat with AI to generate code, debug errors, and automate game development tasks directly within your project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Justsenger/ExHyperV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Justsenger/ExHyperV
Language: c%23
The Excalibur of Hyper-V / Hyper-V 神器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
Language: c%23
Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MonoGame/MonoGame
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MonoGame/MonoGame
Language: c%23
One framework for creating powerful cross-platform games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NickeManarin/ScreenToGif
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NickeManarin/ScreenToGif
Language: c%23
🎬 ScreenToGif allows you to record a selected area of your screen, edit and save it as a gif or video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Prowlarr/Prowlarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr
Language: c%23
Prowlarr is an indexer manager/proxy built on the popular *arr .net/reactjs base stack to integrate with your various PVR apps, supporting management of both Torrent Trackers and Usenet Indexers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
Language: c%23
Technitium DNS Server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YSGStudyHards/DotNetGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YSGStudyHards/DotNetGuide
Language: c%23
🌈【C#/.NET/.NET Core学习、工作、面试指南】记录、收集和总结C#/.NET/.NET Core基础知识、学习路线、开发实战、编程技巧练习、学习视频、文章、书籍、项目框架、社区组织、开发必备工具、技术前沿周刊、常见面试题、面试须知、简历模板、人才招聘、以及自己在学习和工作中的一些微薄见解。希望能和大家一起学习，共同进步。如果本知识库能为您提供帮助，别忘了给予支持哦(关注、点赞、分享)💖。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: creazyboyone/FastGithub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/creazyboyone/FastGithub
Language: c%23
FastGithub 是 GitHub 加速神器，解决 GitHub 打不开、用户头像无法加载、releases 无法上传下载、git-clone、git-pull、git-push

ns0:entry.ns0:title: d2phap/ImageGlass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/d2phap/ImageGlass
Language: c%23
🏞 A lightweight, versatile image viewer

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23

URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: timschneeb/GalaxyBudsClient
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
